description: 10 MHz - 1.4 GHz I2C-programmable XO/VCXO, ultra-low jitter
notes: Slave addr 0x55 (factory default; some variants ship with 0x5D)
6 config registers (HS_DIV, N1, RFREQ split across regs 7-12)
Frequency change requires assert/deassert of FREEZE_DCO bit (reg 137)
Common reference clock for Ethernet PHY, SDR, JESD systems
